The formatter and dependency state already match the bead contract in the base tree, but the required verification gate `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` does not complete green in this environment. A capped `go test -json ./internal/agent/...` run shows pre-existing failures in unrelated execute-bead artifact/cancel tests, for example `TestExecuteBead_ArtifactsCreated`, `TestExecuteBead_ManifestShape`, `TestExecuteBead_ResultShape`, `TestExecuteBead_ReportIncludesRouteEconomics`, `TestExecuteBead_NoChecksArtifactWhenNoGates`, `TestExecuteBead_UsageArtifact`, `TestExecuteBead_NoUsageArtifactWhenNoTokens`, and `TestWorker_HonorsCancelMidAttempt`, all failing with `ExecuteBead: excluding execute-bead cleanup metadata: exit status 128`.

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
